settings.question: Do you ship outside California?
settings.answer: Yes, we ship to all 48 contiguous states in the US. Shipping rates and delivery times vary by location. Please enter your zip code at checkout for an accurate shipping estimate.

settings.question: Can I pick up my order from your warehouse?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Local pickup is available at our La Mirada distribution center. Select Local Pickup at checkout and we will notify you when your order is ready for collection.

settings.question: Can I choose my delivery date?
settings.answer: Once your order has been dispatched, our freight partner will contact you via phone or email to schedule a specific delivery window that works for you.

settings.question: Where is PK Cabinet located?
settings.answer: Our main distribution center and headquarters are located in La Mirada, California. This central location allows us to efficiently manage inventory and shipping.

settings.question: How long does delivery take after ordering?
settings.answer: Most in-stock orders are processed within 24-48 hours. Delivery typically takes 3 to 5 business days depending on your distance from our California warehouse.

settings.question: Do the cabinets come with installation hardware?
settings.answer: Yes, all our cabinets include the necessary assembly hardware and soft-close hinges. However, specific wall-mounting screws may need to be purchased separately based on your wall type.

settings.question: Are PK Cabinet cabinets sold assembled or unassembled?
settings.answer: We offer both options. Our standard shipping is for RTA (Ready-To-Assemble) cabinets, which are easier to ship and more cost-effective. Pre-assembly services are available for local orders.

settings.question: Do you offer installation services?
settings.answer: While we specialize in manufacturing and distribution, we have a network of preferred contractors in Southern California. Contact our trade desk for recommendations.

settings.question: What tools do I need for installation?
settings.answer: For RTA assembly, you will typically need a screwdriver (or power drill), wood glue, and a rubber mallet. For installation, a level, shims, and a stud finder are essential.

settings.question: How do I place an order?
settings.answer: You can place an order directly through our website by adding items to your cart. For large commercial projects or contractor orders, please contact our sales team for a custom quote.

settings.question: Can I modify or cancel my order?
settings.answer: Orders can be modified or cancelled within 24 hours of placement. Once an order has entered the processing or shipping phase, standard return policies will apply.

settings.question: Do you offer bulk or trade discounts?
settings.answer: Yes, we have a dedicated Trade Program for contractors, developers, and interior designers. Please visit our Trade page to apply for professional pricing.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover), PayPal, and Apple Pay. Financing options are also available through our partners.

settings.question: What materials are used in PK Cabinet cabinets?
settings.answer: Our cabinets feature Grade-A plywood boxes and solid wood frames. We do not use particle board in any of our structural components.

settings.question: Are your cabinets solid wood?
settings.answer: Yes, our doors and face frames are made from solid hardwood (typically Maple or Birch), while the cabinet boxes are constructed from high-quality furniture-grade plywood.

settings.question: What is the warranty on your products?
settings.answer: We offer a 5-year limited warranty on all cabinet boxes and a lifetime warranty on our soft-close hardware and hinges against manufacturing defects.

settings.question: Do you offer sample doors?
settings.answer: Yes, we highly recommend ordering a sample door to see the finish and quality in your own home. Sample doors are available for purchase in our Products section.

settings.question: What Shaker styles do you offer?
settings.answer: We specialize in the classic Shaker aesthetic, offering several variations including Slim Shaker, Inset Shaker, and Traditional Shaker in multiple premium finishes.

settings.question: Can I get a custom size cabinet?
settings.answer: While our cabinets come in a wide range of standard modular sizes, we do offer limited customization for specific filler pieces and trim to ensure a perfect fit.

settings.question: How do I choose the right finish?
settings.answer: Consider your kitchens natural light and overall style. Our White Shaker is timeless and bright, while our Grey and Navy options offer a more modern, sophisticated look.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: Unopened items in their original packaging can be returned within 30 days of delivery. A 20% restocking fee applies to all returns, and the customer is responsible for return shipping.

settings.question: How do I initiate a return?
settings.answer: To start a return, please contact our support team with your order number. We will provide you with a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) and shipping instructions.

settings.question: What if my order arrives damaged?
settings.answer: Please inspect your delivery immediately. If you notice damage, note it on the delivery receipt and contact us within 48 hours. We will ship replacement parts at no cost.

settings.question: Are sample doors refundable?
settings.answer: Sample doors are non-refundable, but the cost of your sample can be applied as a credit toward your full kitchen order (minimum purchase applies).

settings.question: Do you offer financing options?
settings.answer: Yes, we partner with leading financing providers to offer flexible payment plans, including 0% APR options for qualified buyers.

settings.question: What are the installment terms?
settings.answer: Terms range from 3 to 24 months depending on the order total and credit approval. You can see your specific options by selecting Financing at checkout.

settings.question: Is there a minimum order for financing?
settings.answer: Financing is typically available for orders over $500. The exact minimum may vary depending on the specific financing partner selected.

settings.question: How do I apply for financing?
settings.answer: Simply select the financing option at checkout. You will be redirected to a secure application that provides an instant decision without affecting your credit score.
